title: BG Quality Pick & Mix Sweets - Choose Your Own Favourites Single Sweet Pouch 800g (Candy Poles)
features: Choose Your Own Favourite Single Sweet Pouch 800g
You will receive your choice in a re-sealable pouch
An ideal treat or gift idea!
description: Product Description BG Quality Pick & Mix Sweets Fresh Sweets Packed Daily Our sweets are packed daily in our UK warehouse and shipped directly to our customers or other fulfilment channels. Re-sealable, Re-Usable Pouches Our candies are packed into re-sealable stand up pouches to keep your sweets fresh! Colourful Mixture of Sweets We select top quality, fresh sweets to use in all of the mixes in our range. Our Mixes balance Fizzy, Gummy, Jelly, Foam and more. Wide Selection of Sweets & Pouches Your chosen mix will contain a varies assortment of different sweets from classic retros to new favourites! BG Quality Pick & Mix Sweets - Explore Our Range! BG Quality Pick & Mix Sweets - Something for Everyone! Here at BG Sweets , we select quality confectionery to create a wide-range of pouches where there is something for everyone; We have our iconic, classic Mixed, Non-Fizzy & Fizzy pouches which are the cornerstone of our store Our Special diet & lifestyle choices include Vegan, Gluten-Free and Halal offerings We have themed mixes including Love, Peelable, Pink & Blue Pouches Don't miss our seasonal Easter, Halloween & Christmas bags You can also customise your bag using our Create Your Own listing Our treats are perfect for parties, movie nights, birthdays, that gift idea or just for you! BG Gifting Range Clear Gifting Jars We now have a range of classic mixes and single sweets available in clear, plastic Jars. These are a brilliant gifting idea! Hamper Boxes Our Mixed, Fizzy & Non-Fizzy sweets are now available in a handy hamper box. Stand-up Re-sealable Pouches Our candies are packed into re-sealable stand up pouches to keep your sweets fresh whilst giving them an eye-catching look! What's in our range? Classic Pick & Mix Pouches Single Favourite Sweet Bags Wrapped & Hardboiled Sweets Vanilla & Clotted Cream Fudge Chocolate Candy & Bon Bons Liquorice & Cables
